name: Ollama
description: Run LLMs locally — Llama, Mistral, Gemma, DeepSeek, and 100+ models via CLI and REST API. OpenAI-compatible endpoint at localhost:11434 for direct agent integration.

skills.name: Local Model Serving
skills.description: Serve 100+ open-source LLMs locally with one command; auto-downloads models on first request.

skills.name: OpenAI-Compatible API
skills.description: Call local models via the same endpoints as OpenAI — drop-in replacement for any OpenAI SDK integration.

skills.name: Model Management
skills.description: Pull, list, copy, delete, and inspect GGUF quantized models from the Ollama model registry.
